description:
Official video for ‘Boom’ by Token and J.I.D 

New album ‘Pink Is Better’ out now: https://tokenllc.lnk.to/PinkIsBetter
Token’s discord: https://discord.com/invite/HcfNm6jdrF
New Token merch: http://www.nevertoodifferent.com
Subscribe to Token: http://bit.ly/tokensubscribe

Prod. by: Ronny J, Brian “Nox” Eisner
Directed by Ben Proulx x Token

Follow Token:
https://www.instagram.com/tokenhiphop
https://www.tiktok.com/@tokenhiphop? 
https://twitter.com/tokenhiphop
https://www.facebook.com/tokenhiphop
https://soundcloud.com/tokenhiphop
https://www.tokenhiphop.com

Follow Token’s label:
https://www.instagram.com/nevertoodifferent/ 
https://twitter.com/nevertoodiff 
https://www.facebook.com/nevertoodifferent 

#Token #JID #Boom

‘Boom’ lyrics:

Roll through the city with the vroom vroom
I got hoes tryna get me in the room room
I get low and they hit me with the zoom zoom
I got foes and the semis and the deuce deuce

She wanna jump in the back, feel like a poncho
Leave with a couple of scratches, shout out to Dcaso
Keys, I don’t know what they are, I just click shit
People wanna put me in charge, I do big shit
Weed in a couple of jars, it’s for the homie though
Least five bitches look at me like I’m their Romeo 
Knee-high boots I think she ’bout to join the rodeo
Levi’s tighter than a knot, when you board a boat
Board a boat, cold flow, four below
Little mixed bitch, she’s a Oreo 
She’s used to Digiorno’s, flew her out to Milan,
Now she take a pic of every plate we bout to eat on, we on man
What the fuck is it really?
Came a long way from taking two trains to the city, 
Two chains to the Tity,
Wu-Tang to the C.R.E.AM.
Liu Kang,
‘Cause she flew two lakes for the kiddie, feel me?

Roll through the city with the vroom vroom
I got hoes tryna get me in the room room
I get low and they hit me with the zoom zoom
I got foes and the semis and the deuce deuce 

Boom Boom 
Boom Boom 
Boom Boom 
Boom Boom

My brother finna get it in blood, and you gotta pay for it
Finna hit the bank in a minute to get a bankroll
Jiddie, a idiot, just a n***a like the Django
I got (pew pew pew) to kill Thanos
I’m doing my thang though
Don’t be thinking I’m playing though
Animation a animal 
And my nature is a beast
And no nation look crazy n***a running naked taking shit, serving fiends out the vacant, by the basement 
N****s looking out of space
I been out of place, the wrong time in the right state of mind
Tryna multitask the page to a dollar sign, before they toe my tag, she thought it was a taser
I don’t know karate, so I must be crazy
N***a what’s crackin? What’s popping? Wes Craven
If you cross my dawg, n***a been barking all day and I keep a K9, it get it to popping like Cane and-

Top, top of the line, I feel like Pluto
Drop top in the mind, right next to Hublot
Cop-coping a dime, so bad she evil
Sloppy toppy and the hottie nastier than Rico 
Made her boujie, now she want the sushi with tobiko
Freaky little bitch, she wear a choker like the emo
Liquor in the body, body feel like it’s a hero
Hit ‘em and the end with a stitch without the Lilo
Oh my baby like Tito’s but she horny off the Henny,
If I sold a couple hoodies, could afford a new Bentley
Empty cups around the room, I guess we pouring too many,
Tryna cop the suicidals, like my door’s too heavy
Tryna cop another crib, it’s like the one I got broke,
Got her bouncing up and down, it’s like she’s jumping jump rope
Drum hit em like bum bum bum, bum bum bum hoe!
Pink’s better but I get redder with the heat close

Roll through the city with the vroom vroom
I got hoes tryna get me in the room room
I get low and they hit me with the zoom zoom
I got foes and the semis and the deuce deuce 

Boom Boom 
Boom Boom 
Boom Boom 
Boom Boom
